output: T7 is complete. Existing edge and frontend suites were extended in place to cover selected-clip shot metadata normalization and continuation recovery, selected-clip prompt and shared-shot system-prompt context, timeline summary shot-group output, same-shot resolver precedence, duplicate fast-path behavior when selected clips already share an explicit `shot_id`, create-task shot reuse, and frontend attachment merge/send payload preservation. The existing `TimelineCanvas` single-click shot-group selection regression remained covered by the unchanged full module, and the batch checkpoint was written.

task_updates.executor_notes: Extended existing edge and frontend suites only. Added coverage for selected-clip shot metadata normalization, continuation recovery round-trip, selected-clip prompt shot context, shared-shot system prompt guidance, timeline summary shot-group output, same-shot resolver precedence, duplicate fast-path behavior when selected clips already carry a shared explicit `shot_id`, create-task shot reuse, and frontend attachment merge/send payload preservation. The existing `TimelineCanvas` single-click shot-group selection regression remains covered by the unchanged full module. Verified with the full edge and frontend Vitest modules.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The required coverage gaps are closed by extending existing suites only: selected-clip shot metadata normalization and continuation recovery in `selectedClips.test.ts` and `loop.test.ts`, prompt and shared-shot system-prompt context in `loop.test.ts`, timeline summary shot-group output in `tools/timeline.test.ts`, same-shot resolver precedence and duplicate fast path in `tools/clips.test.ts`, create-task shot reuse in `tools/create-task.test.ts`, frontend merge/send payload preservation in `AgentChat.test.tsx` and `useAgentSession.test.tsx`, and the existing shot-group single-click selection regression remains covered by the full `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` module run.
